name: HMS St. Austell Bay (K 634)
events: 20 Jun 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with St. Austell Bay (A/Lt.Cdr. A.J. Lee, DSC, RN). (1)
21 Jun 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with St. Austell Bay (A/Lt.Cdr. A.J. Lee, DSC, RN). (1)
